body: Thanks for booking with Hayes Auto Works. Your appointment is confirmed. See you soon at the shop in East Dearborn.
subject: Your appointment is confirmed

body: Invoice #1042 for your recent service is attached. Let us know if anything looks off and thanks for choosing Hayes Auto Works.
subject: Your service invoice is ready

body: Our records show your car is due for an oil change. Book online or give us a call and we will get you in.
subject: Service reminder: time for an oil change

body: Cold weather is here. This month: battery testing, tire checks, and a peek at the Chevelle restoration. Stop in for your winter inspection.
subject: Winter prep newsletter from Hayes Auto Works

body: Your car is finished and ready for pickup at Hayes Auto Works. We are open until 6pm today.
subject: Your vehicle is ready for pickup

body: Just a reminder that your appointment at Hayes Auto Works is tomorrow at 10am. See you then.
subject: Appointment reminder for tomorrow

body: Thanks for visiting Hayes Auto Works. We would love your feedback on how we did. It helps our small shop a lot.
subject: How was your visit?
